name: 컴포넌트 참여자 드롭다운
daemon_scope: Consumes the accepted SaaS assignment after task/subtask target validation. It does not sort dropdown rows or decide participant UI sections.
daemon_consumed_facts: task assignment command accepted by SaaS

name: 댓글 소통
daemon_scope: Reports provider progress batches with thread identity and consumes stop/cancel commands polled from SaaS. It does not create rendered comments or keep client streams open.

name: 추가 기획 내용
daemon_scope: Accepts only already-authorized task/subtask assignments. It does not extend assignment to project, milestone, intake, AI property filler, or mention surfaces.
client_owned_facts: which non-target surfaces hide or disable agent UI

name: 메뉴바
daemon_scope: No executable daemon behavior. Menu navigation can open a screen that later reads SaaS/device data, but the daemon does not own route labels or availability.

name: 런타임 설정페이지
daemon_scope: Owns local current-device lifecycle facts and executes accepted agent-bound lifecycle commands. SaaS owns the remote read model projected to the client.

name: 런타임 상세페이지
daemon_scope: Projects one selected runtime's local identity, provider version, liveness, device, owner, and assigned-agent linkage as facts consumed by the SaaS/client read model. It does not own back navigation, row presentation, agent hover state, or agent edit navigation.

name: 에이전트 설정페이지
daemon_scope: Consumes the assigned runtime, selected model, and instruction snapshot during provider execution. It does not create, update, delete, timestamp, or validate saved agent records.

name: 에이전트 추가
daemon_scope: No direct daemon mutation. The daemon only sees the resulting assignment/runtime values if the created agent is later assigned.
daemon_consumed_facts: created agent runtime/model/instruction only after assignment

name: 에이전트 목록
daemon_scope: No list rendering ownership. The daemon may contribute liveness evidence that SaaS projects, but it does not order, filter, or style agent rows.

name: Wireframe - 온보딩
daemon_scope: Supplies runtime detection/liveness to onboarding screens and later consumes the assigned instruction/runtime/model. It does not own onboarding sequence or workspace selection.

name: 돌아가는 AI 보여주기
daemon_scope: Owns provider binary detection and liveness evidence. It does not own the detected/not-detected labels, radio state, or row dimming.

name: 에이전트 선택
daemon_scope: No fixture catalog ownership. Fixture selection creates a normal agent upstream; daemon only consumes that agent after assignment.
daemon_consumed_facts: assigned instruction/runtime/model after fixture-created agent is assigned

name: Ex AI - 온보딩 순서 변경 메모
daemon_scope: No onboarding draft execution ownership. The revised order lets clients collect a local agent draft/configuration before runtime and workspace selection; daemon only consumes the final SaaS-authorized assignment/runtime/model/instruction snapshot after workspace_id and runtime_id are known.
daemon_consumed_facts: final model id after SaaS authorization

name: Frame 6350445
daemon_scope: No direct-setting form ownership. The daemon consumes only the final instruction/runtime/model snapshot after SaaS authorization.

name: Frame 6350447
daemon_scope: No workspace selection ownership. Workspace-scoped agent creation happens upstream before daemon execution.
daemon_consumed_facts: workspace-scoped assignment only after SaaS accepts it

name: 돌아가는 AI 보여주기
daemon_scope: Reports no selectable runtime when providers are absent/offline. It does not install providers or start a provider installation flow.

name: 데스크탑앱 온보딩-런타임 감지 X
daemon_scope: Supplies negative detection/liveness evidence only. It does not bundle, download, install, or update Claude/Codex/OpenClaw/Cursor.

name: 웹 온보딩
daemon_scope: No web onboarding command ownership. The macOS app download can eventually launch a daemon artifact, but sign-up, terms, invites, and waitlist stay product/client facts.

name: 런타임 설정페이지 엠티
daemon_scope: Contributes local liveness/detection facts when running. Empty-state install cards, Windows waitlist, and marketing consent are outside daemon execution.
